chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Necessitates Discretionary Punishment, Legal Punishment, Stoning, Execution, and Exile in Adultery

text: 5021 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ اَلسَّكُونِيِّ : "أَنَّ ثَلاَثَةً شَهِدُوا عَلَى رَجُلٍ بِالزِّنَا فَقَالَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ "أَيْنَ اَلرَّابِعُ" فَقَالُوا اَلْآنَ يَجِيءُ فَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ "حُدُّوهُمْ فَلَيْسَ فِي اَلْحُدُودِ نَظَرُ سَاعَةٍ" ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5021 - In the narration from Al-Sakuni, it is reported that three individuals testified against a man for committing adultery.
Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) asked: "Where is the fourth witness?"
They replied: "He is coming now."
Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) then said: "Administer the punishment to them, for there is no delay in enforcing legal punishments."
